value.found_quote:
## Disable or uninstall

To turn off individual layers while keeping the rest, set the matching environment variable:
value.rationale: The page has a "Disable or uninstall" section describing how to turn off individual layers via environment variables, disable the whole plugin (SECURITY_GUIDANCE_DISABLE=1 or /plugin disable), and uninstall it (/plugin uninstall). This substantiates the claim.
